pageContext.name: Roche
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Square Enix present the motorcycle and speed-loving, rebellious 3-C SOLDIER operator, Roche from FINAL FANTASY VII REMAKE joins the PLAY ARTS KAI lineup!  He makes his first appearance in the remake as Cloud's new rival, with his distinctive hairstyle and belligerent expression, which can be seen in this figure. The costume is detailed down to the shoulder armor, the wrinkles on the rider jacket, the pouch on his leg, and belt on his waist, while also ensuring mobility.  Included with the figure are hand parts for various expressions, an interchangeable face for 3-C SOLDIER operator, and a sword that can be mounted on his back or held in his hand, allowing for various scenes from the game to be recreated.
